name: Urimax / Flomax
source_note: Data compiled for Arogya knowledge base. Verify against 1mg.com and pharmeasy.in for live updates.
how_it_works: Selective alpha-1A/1D adrenoceptor blocker that relaxes smooth muscle in the prostate and bladder neck, improving urine flow without significantly affecting blood pressure.

serious: Intraoperative floppy iris syndrome (inform ophthalmologist before eye surgery)

food_interactions: Alcohol worsens hypotension — avoid at first dose
Take after same meal each day
what_to_avoid: First dose at bedtime to avoid fall risk
Tell ophthalmologist before any eye surgery
Retrograde ejaculation is not harmful but is expected
